requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters in Gabon Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——加蓬项目中光伏逆变器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——加彭項目中光伏逆變器的IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: No standalone Gabon public EMC regulation dedicated to PV inverters was identified in the sources reviewed. For grid-tied or financed PV projects, EMC acceptance is likely to be driven by AGANOR standards and conformity expectations, SEEG connection review, and donor, lender, or EPC specifications. The practical evidence set should include IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment EMC, relevant IEC 61000 immunity and emission reports, and harmonic-current evidence such as IEC 61000-3-2 where applicable to the inverter rating and configuration.
summary.zh: 在已审阅来源中，未发现加蓬发布专门针对光伏逆变器的独立公开EMC法规。对于并网或融资光伏项目，EMC接受通常会由AGANOR标准及合格评定期望、SEEG接入审查以及捐助方、融资方或EPC规格共同驱动。实际证据集应包括光伏功率变换设备EMC的IEC 62920、相关IEC 61000抗扰度和发射报告，以及在适用于该逆变器额定值和配置时的IEC 61000-3-2等谐波电流证据。
summary.zht: 在已審閱來源中，未發現加彭發布專門針對光伏逆變器的獨立公開EMC法規。對於併網或融資光伏項目，EMC接受通常會由AGANOR標準及合格評定期望、SEEG接入審查以及捐助方、融資方或EPC規格共同驅動。實際證據集應包括光伏功率轉換設備EMC的IEC 62920、相關IEC 61000抗擾度和發射報告，以及在適用於該逆變器額定值和配置時的IEC 61000-3-2等諧波電流證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission and immunity standards
IEC 61000-3-2 — Harmonic current emission limits where applicable by current rating
AGANOR standards and conformity-assessment context for Gabon market documentation

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408 and related domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. Those reports may use IEC 61000-derived methods, but a China-only GB/T report is not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62920 report requested by a Gabon project owner, SEEG reviewer, lender, or EPC contractor.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408及CNAS认可实验室出具的相关国内测试报告。上述报告可能采用源自IEC 61000的方法，但仅限中国GB/T的报告不会自动等同于加蓬项目业主、SEEG审查方、融资方或EPC承包商要求的IEC 62920报告。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常基於GB/T 37408及CNAS認可實驗室出具的相關國內測試報告。上述報告可能採用源自IEC 61000的方法，但僅限中國GB/T的報告不會自動等同於加彭項目業主、SEEG審查方、融資方或EPC承包商要求的IEC 62920報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T EMC evidence should be mapped clause-by-clause against IEC 62920 and the applicable IEC 61000 reports requested in the Gabon project specification. Exporters should prepare IEC EMC type-test reports for the supplied model, identify the tested firmware and hardware revision, confirm whether results remain valid at 220/380 V and the intended power rating, and provide installation guidance for cable routing, earthing, surge protection, and humid tropical environments.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T EMC证据应逐条映射至IEC 62920及加蓬项目规格要求的适用IEC 61000报告。出口商应准备所供应型号的IEC EMC型式试验报告，识别被测固件和硬件版本，确认结果在220/380 V及目标功率等级下是否仍有效，并提供电缆敷设、接地、浪涌保护和潮湿热带环境安装指导。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T EMC證據應逐條映射至IEC 62920及加彭項目規格要求的適用IEC 61000報告。出口商應準備所供應型號的IEC EMC型式試驗報告，識別被測韌體和硬體版本，確認結果在220/380 V及目標功率等級下是否仍有效，並提供電纜敷設、接地、浪湧保護和潮濕熱帶環境安裝指導。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by AGANOR conformity review, SEEG connection conditions, project-owner procurement, EPC specifications, donor rules, or lender technical due diligence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China depending on certification route; China-only GB/T EMC evidence is not a Gabon acceptance decision

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a GB/T 37408 EMC report will satisfy a Gabon project file. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence for the exact inverter model, and confirm the required report list with AGANOR, SEEG, the EPC contractor, and any donor or lender before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假设GB/T 37408 EMC报告能够满足加蓬项目文件要求。应为特定逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000证据，并在出货前与AGANOR、SEEG、EPC承包商及任何捐助方或融资方确认所需报告清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假設GB/T 37408 EMC報告能夠滿足加彭項目文件要求。應為特定逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000證據，並在出貨前與AGANOR、SEEG、EPC承包商及任何捐助方或融資方確認所需報告清單。
